<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Options; use Symfony\Component\Console\Input\InputOption; class BailOption { final public const string ARGUMENT = 'bail'; public static function remove(): bool { return false; } public static function match(string $argument): bool { return $argument === sprintf('--%s', self::ARGUMENT); } public static function inputOption(): InputOption { return new InputOption(sprintf('--%s', self::ARGUMENT), null, InputOption::VALUE_NONE, ''); } }
